title: How To Make Graphene Oxide - The Tour Method
description:
The FWG Website is at www.fwgltd.co.uk This is from the paper 'Improved synthesis of Graphene Oxide' by Marcano et al in ACS Nano. You need:

3g graphite
18g potassium Permanganate

360mL 96% Sulphuric Acid
40mL 75% Phosphoric Acid

3mL 35% Hydrogen Peroxide
400mL DI water as ice

to wash you need

200mL DI Water
200mL 30% Hydrochloric Acid
200mL Ethanol

I will write up a PDF on this and post it to the FWG site
